purpose: Hamburger-icon dropdown that switches the global appMode between 'chat' and 'code'. Reads appMode from AppContext and dispatches SET_APP_MODE. Closes on outside click via document mousedown listener. Two menu items render with check-mark active state and per-item icons.
gotchas: Selecting the currently-active mode is a no-op (`if (mode !== appMode)`); UI does not give feedback that no switch happened.
Document-level mousedown listener is added/removed based on `open` state — if the component unmounts while open, cleanup must still run.
patterns: Outside-click pattern: useRef + useEffect + addEventListener('mousedown') gated by open state; identical to Header archive dropdown.
conventions: Inline SVG icons; classes mode-menu-btn / mode-menu-dropdown / mode-menu-item.
